headline: Brock Group Relocates Headquarters to Houston's Energy Corridor
summary: The Brock Group, a North American industrial specialty services contractor, has relocated its headquarters to North Eldridge Parkway in Houston's Energy Corridor District. The move positions the company at the center of one of the nation's leading energy and industrial hubs, reinforcing its alignment with the markets it serves.

headline: Important Factors to Watch Ahead of BP's Q1 Earnings Release
summary: BP to report Q1 2026 on April 28, with consensus at 85 cents per ADS and $57.6 billion revenue after recent beats and stronger refining margins.
